events.label: reasoning
events.text:
>
{"decision": "fail", "risk": "high", "work_stage": "in-service", "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"], "percent_complete": 100, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0, "rate": 0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Missing lockable disconnect for motor circuit maintenance", "No means to safely isolate and secure the motor circuit during servicing", "Violates safe work practice and lockout/tagout requirements for in-service equipment"], "actions": ["Install a listed lockable disconnect within sight and readily accessible from the motor/controller location", "Verify disconnect is rated for the motor circuit horsepower/voltage and can be locked in the open position", "Update drawings and maintenance procedures to reflect the disconnect location", "Re-inspect before returning to service"], "rationale": "NEC Art. 430 requires a disconnecting means within sight from and readily accessible from the motor and controller, and it must be lockable in the open position for maintenance. A missing lockable disconnect on an in-service motor circuit prevents safe isolation and lockout/tagout, creating a serious shock/electrocution and uncontrolled energization hazard during maintenance.", "references": ["NEC Art. 430"]}
